content: Not sure you will see this but thank you Light for the clarification on the change and the rollback in response to the feedback. I'm sure you guys get plenty of good and bad messages thrown at you so let me be one of the good ones. I hope this doesn't scare y'all away from making changes but I also hope you have learned to maybe do something like this note first and get feedback from the players as well as the team to find a good compromise.

content: <@1487626955791663208> 考慮過給空幻另外搞一個常駐專屬池嗎，比如現在要更新第5章，專屬池可以抽取第4章及以前的角色，讓玩家選擇哪隻up角色/命輪抽取(最好不要混池)，主要是想避免新章玩家也未必有心儀角色想要抽取的情況，一方面是怕被空幻吃到抽池大保、另一方面不用掉變無垢又覺得浪費，復刻也不一定是自己想要抽的，另外再塞商店賣個200甚至300銀芯一顆，讓空幻同時作為一種新抽取資源提升價值🤔

content: Hmm, interesting.  As a new player, I was willing to at least wait until the patch to see how the initial proposed Ethereal Core changes would work and affect the reward structure of events.  Definitely glad for the increased transparency and communication about this issue after the fact, and I hope you decide to communicate decisions like these ahead of time in the future. <:pray:1356053116260454534>  Hope y'all can find alternate ways to tackle the underlying problems with account selling/trading

content:
Anyway... This is probably a hot take but: while I'm glad that BIAV is listening, I do think BIAV is a bit too hasty at responding to player's feedback. Show some spine. Try to defend yourself. Let's test things out. And if it doesn't work out, then you guys can walk it back. 

Again, I'm glad that you guys are listening. But I prefer a dynamic where the player and the dev are in conversation with one another. Not just doing, "oh yeah sorry, this is our oopsie. Here is your compensation."

Mao Faust was too broken cause of oversight

while i understand  the sentiment as gamers have gotten too comfortable bullying devs lately unfairly and not with actual criticism (see slay the spire 2 making balance changes), at the same time morimens is a live service game

致歉：V2.5.0 「空幻之芯」奖励调整和未来计划 Apology: V2.5.0 Ethereal Core Reward Adjustments and Future Plans

content:
I don’t understand this design choice: if the purpose of Eternal Cores is to prevent resellers from hoarding pulls, why are they included in purchasable bundles? If anything, currency bought with real money should be freely usable whether it's pre-order or any other deal, because it's logical - resellers do not invest into accounts, so they will not buy anything whatsoever? lol

The only reasonable use of these cores, in my view, is for anniversary rewards or other large amounts of free pulls that could be exploited this way, but generally the whole thing seems shady and I say that with the best intentions
thread_title: 致歉：V2.5.0 「空幻之芯」奖励调整和未来计划 Apology: V2.5.0 Ethereal Core Reward Adjustments and Future Plans

content:
Making it harder for all the legit players in order to fight an unknown minority of resellers is a choice.

Also let's be real, even if account buying is an issue, I doubt someone opening their wallet to buy an account will stay f2p after that.
thread_title: 致歉：V2.5.0 「空幻之芯」奖励调整和未来计划 Apology: V2.5.0 Ethereal Core Reward Adjustments and Future Plans

content:
The point is valid! I also looked into the reseller market, specifically for Morimens, and it doesn’t seem very active or profitable.

At the end of the day, there are other ways to prevent people from reselling. Moreover you can’t really stop people from making bad purchasing decisions anyway

thread_title: 问&答：关于最终法则与未来规划 Q&A: Regarding Absolute Axiom and the Future Plan

content:
「空幻之芯」是 V2.5.0 中引入的全新奖励道具，它预期在整个 V2.5.X 中能够作为「流明之芯」使用，而在 V2.5.X 结束后则会转化为「无垢之芯」。

这个设计的主要考量是，防止一些灰色工作室利用我们游戏内的奖励进行长期积累，最终滋生不安全、不合法的账号交易行为，这会影响大家的账号安全和公平性，也不利于游戏的长期发展。次要考量是，我们也希望提高游戏内的奖励进一步缓解正常游玩的守密人抽取负担，通过「空幻之芯」这样我们就可以在游戏中为大家带来更多奖励。这两个考量都比较敏感，所以请原谅我最初没有明说这一点。

然而，这项调整确实存在问题，改变原有的奖励结构会误伤了部分守密人正常的游玩习惯，迫使大家可自由支配的资源变少。昨天各个社区在我进行解释作用后也依然产生了许多担忧和讨论，大家的声音，我们都切实的听到了。我作为制作人，对于这项调整未能充分与大家沟通、设计也存在不成熟、影响大家体验的地方深感自责，在此向大家真诚的致歉。

经过仔细研究和讨论，我们决定修正这个错误，会立即对「空幻之芯」的当前奖励设计做出调整：

- 「空幻之芯」只可能用于今后游戏内新增加的奖励、新的购买内容、或特殊玩法活动等纪念场合大量发放等特殊场合。
- 目前游戏内的奖励、版本预览图中原有的常规活动奖励的「空幻之芯」都将变回「流明之芯」，以确保大家在游戏常规活动原有应得的奖励不会有任何自由度的损失。

非常感谢大家提出了具体反馈、建议、做了详细分析——在你们的反馈帮助我们下定决心推动了这次调整。希望大家能够继续多多支持脑缸组与《忘却前夜》！我们将继续保持聆听！
thread_title: 致歉：V2.5.0 「空幻之芯」奖励调整和未来计划 Apology: V2.5.0 Ethereal Core Reward Adjustments and Future Plans
